timeline.followToSee: Follow friends to see their posts here.
timeline.guestWelcomeBody: Gourmeet helps you discover restaurants through your friends'
timeline.guestWelcomeBody2: rather than anonymous reviews or average ratings.
timeline.guestWelcomeBody3: Browse your friends' posts to compare restaurants by photos, location, and price, share your favorites on the timeline, and build your profile.
timeline.signupIn5SecDesc: Get started with your email or Google account.
timeline.zeroFollowDesc: Start by following friends or interesting people in the Discover tab to build your timeline.
timeline.ctaFindFriendsDesc: Search for users or explore new posts in the Discover tab.
timeline.ctaNoFriendPostsDesc: Follow people you're interested in to build your timeline.
timeline.ctaNoFollowingPosts: No posts from people you follow yet
timeline.ctaNoFollowingPostsDesc: Follow more people, or check back later.
timeline.faqA1: Gourmeet is a food-focused SNS where you discover restaurants through recommendations from people you trust, not anonymous reviewers. Photo-only posts are fine too.
timeline.faqQ2: Can I just browse without posting?
timeline.faqA2: Yes. Some public posts can be previewed without logging in. Logging in gives you access to posts from people you follow.
timeline.faqQ3: Is it really free? Will there be charges later?
timeline.faqA3: It's completely free right now. There will be no sudden charges.
timeline.faqQ4: What do I need to create an account?
timeline.faqA4: You can sign up with an email or Google account. It takes just a few seconds.
timeline.faqQ5: How does it help with choosing restaurants?
timeline.faqA5: Posts include photos, restaurant names, atmosphere, and price info, making it easy to compare options.
timeline.faqA6: Anyone who wants to know their friends' favorites, share their own, or plan where to go together.
timeline.faqQ7: Can I enjoy it without friends?
timeline.faqA7: The Discover tab gives you a feel for the app. It's even more fun with friends, family, or a partner.
timeline.faqQ8: Will the other person be notified when I follow them?
timeline.faqA8: Yes. They'll know you followed them. For private accounts, you'll need their approval to see posts.
timeline.faqA9: A setting where only approved followers can see your posts. Great for sharing only with friends.
timeline.faqA10: Yes. Blocking hides both users' posts and profiles from each other.
timeline.faqQ11: What should I write in a post?
timeline.faqA11: Share your highlights, rating, tags, etc. Even a short comment is fine. A photo and restaurant name alone make a great recommendation.
timeline.faqQ12: How do I add restaurant info to a post?
timeline.faqA12: Type the restaurant name and it automatically pulls info from Google Maps.
timeline.faqQ13: What is the detail request feature?
timeline.faqA13: Send a detail request on posts you're curious about to ask for more info. You can send it anonymously.
timeline.faqA14: A tab for finding new restaurants and users from public posts nationwide.
timeline.faqA15: Yes. You can filter by area, station, genre, tags, and more.
timeline.faqA16: A feature to save posts or restaurants you want to visit or revisit as personal lists.
timeline.faqQ17: Can I review saved restaurants later?
timeline.faqA17: Yes. You can always access them from your collections.
